Module redis Copy item path
===========================

[Source](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/src/nautilus_infrastructure/redis/mod.rs.html#16-403)

Expand description

Provides a Redis backed `CacheDatabase` and `MessageBusDatabase` implementation.

Modules[§](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_infrastructure/redis/index.html#modules)

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[cache](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_infrastructure/redis/cache/index.html "mod nautilus_infrastructure::redis::cache")

Redis-backed cache database for the system.

[msgbus](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_infrastructure/redis/msgbus/index.html "mod nautilus_infrastructure::redis::msgbus")

Redis-backed message bus database for the system.

[queries](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_infrastructure/redis/queries/index.html "mod nautilus_infrastructure::redis::queries")

Functions[§](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_infrastructure/redis/index.html#functions)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[create\_redis\_connection](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_infrastructure/redis/fn.create_redis_connection.html "fn nautilus_infrastructure::redis::create_redis_connection")

Creates a new Redis connection manager based on the provided database `config` and connection name.

[flush\_redis](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_infrastructure/redis/fn.flush_redis.html "fn nautilus_infrastructure::redis::flush_redis")

Flushes the entire Redis database for the specified connection.

[get\_redis\_url](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_infrastructure/redis/fn.get_redis_url.html "fn nautilus_infrastructure::redis::get_redis_url")

Parses a Redis connection URL from the given database config, returning the full URL and a redacted version with the password obfuscated.

[get\_redis\_version](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_infrastructure/redis/fn.get_redis_version.html "fn nautilus_infrastructure::redis::get_redis_version")

Retrieves and parses the Redis server version via the INFO command.

[get\_stream\_key](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_infrastructure/redis/fn.get_stream_key.html "fn nautilus_infrastructure::redis::get_stream_key")

Parse the stream key from the given identifiers and config.

# nautilus_common::component - Rust

[Skip to main content](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_common/component/index.html#main-content)

[Module component](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_common/component/index.html#)

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[nautilus\_common](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_common/index.html)

Module component Copy item path
===============================

[Source](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/src/nautilus_common/component.rs.html#16-749)

Expand description

Component system for managing stateful system entities.

This module provides the component framework for managing the lifecycle and state of system entities. Components have defined states (pre-initialized, ready, running, stopped, etc.) and provide a consistent interface for state management and transitions.

Structs[§](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_common/component/index.html#structs)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ComponentRegistry](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_common/component/struct.ComponentRegistry.html "struct nautilus_common::component::ComponentRegistry")

Registry for storing components with runtime borrow tracking.

Traits[§](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_common/component/index.html#traits)

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Component](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_common/component/trait.Component.html "trait nautilus_common::component::Component")

Components have state and lifecycle management capabilities.

Functions[§](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_common/component/index.html#functions)

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[dispose\_component](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_common/component/fn.dispose_component.html "fn nautilus_common::component::dispose_component")

Safely calls dispose() on a component in the global registry.

[get\_component](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_common/component/fn.get_component.html "fn nautilus_common::component::get_component")

Returns a component from the global registry by ID.

[get\_component\_registry](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_common/component/fn.get_component_registry.html "fn nautilus_common::component::get_component_registry")

Returns a reference to the global component registry.

[register\_component](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_common/component/fn.register_component.html "fn nautilus_common::component::register_component")

Registers a component.

[register\_component\_actor](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_common/component/fn.register_component_actor.html "fn nautilus_common::component::register_component_actor")

Registers a component that also implements Actor.

[reset\_component](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_common/component/fn.reset_component.html "fn nautilus_common::component::reset_component")

Safely calls reset() on a component in the global registry.

[start\_component](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_common/component/fn.start_component.html "fn nautilus_common::component::start_component")

Safely calls start() on a component in the global registry.

[stop\_component](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_common/component/fn.stop_component.html "fn nautilus_common::component::stop_component")

Safely calls stop() on a component in the global registry.

[aggregation](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_model/orderbook/aggregation/index.html "mod nautilus_model::orderbook::aggregation")

Functions related to normalizing and processing top-of-book events.

[analysis](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_model/orderbook/analysis/index.html "mod nautilus_model::orderbook::analysis")

Functions related to order book analysis.

[book](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_model/orderbook/book/index.html "mod nautilus_model::orderbook::book")

A performant, generic, multi-purpose order book.

[display](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_model/orderbook/display/index.html "mod nautilus_model::orderbook::display")

Functions related to order book display.

[error](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_model/orderbook/error/index.html "mod nautilus_model::orderbook::error")

Errors associated with order book operations and integrity.

[ladder](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_model/orderbook/ladder/index.html "mod nautilus_model::orderbook::ladder")

Represents a ladder of price levels for one side of an order book.

[level](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_model/orderbook/level/index.html "mod nautilus_model::orderbook::level")

Represents a discrete price level in an order book.

[own](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_model/orderbook/own/index.html "mod nautilus_model::orderbook::own")

An `OwnBookOrder` for use with tracking own/user orders in L3 order books. It organizes orders into bid and ask ladders, maintains timestamps for state changes, and provides various methods for adding, updating, deleting, and querying orders.

Module aggregation Copy item path
=================================

[Source](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/src/nautilus_data/aggregation.rs.html#16-4462)

Expand description

Bar aggregation machinery.

Defines the `BarAggregator` trait and core aggregation types (tick, volume, value, time), along with the `BarBuilder` and `BarAggregatorCore` helpers for constructing bars.

Structs[§](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_data/aggregation/index.html#structs)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[BarAggregatorCore](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_data/aggregation/struct.BarAggregatorCore.html "struct nautilus_data::aggregation::BarAggregatorCore")

Provides a means of aggregating specified bar types and sending to a registered handler.

[BarBuilder](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_data/aggregation/struct.BarBuilder.html "struct nautilus_data::aggregation::BarBuilder")

Provides a generic bar builder for aggregation.

[RenkoBarAggregator](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_data/aggregation/struct.RenkoBarAggregator.html "struct nautilus_data::aggregation::RenkoBarAggregator")

Provides a means of building Renko bars aggregated from quote and trades.

[TickBarAggregator](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_data/aggregation/struct.TickBarAggregator.html "struct nautilus_data::aggregation::TickBarAggregator")

Provides a means of building tick bars aggregated from quote and trades.

[TickImbalanceBarAggregator](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_data/aggregation/struct.TickImbalanceBarAggregator.html "struct nautilus_data::aggregation::TickImbalanceBarAggregator")

Aggregates bars based on tick buy/sell imbalance.

[TickRunsBarAggregator](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_data/aggregation/struct.TickRunsBarAggregator.html "struct nautilus_data::aggregation::TickRunsBarAggregator")

Aggregates bars based on consecutive buy/sell tick runs.

[TimeBarAggregator](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_data/aggregation/struct.TimeBarAggregator.html "struct nautilus_data::aggregation::TimeBarAggregator")

Provides a means of building time bars aggregated from quote and trades.

[ValueBarAggregator](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_data/aggregation/struct.ValueBarAggregator.html "struct nautilus_data::aggregation::ValueBarAggregator")

Provides a means of building value bars aggregated from quote and trades.

[ValueImbalanceBarAggregator](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_data/aggregation/struct.ValueImbalanceBarAggregator.html "struct nautilus_data::aggregation::ValueImbalanceBarAggregator")

Aggregates bars based on buy/sell notional imbalance.

[ValueRunsBarAggregator](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_data/aggregation/struct.ValueRunsBarAggregator.html "struct nautilus_data::aggregation::ValueRunsBarAggregator")

Aggregates bars based on consecutive buy/sell notional runs.

[VolumeBarAggregator](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_data/aggregation/struct.VolumeBarAggregator.html "struct nautilus_data::aggregation::VolumeBarAggregator")

Provides a means of building volume bars aggregated from quote and trades.

[VolumeImbalanceBarAggregator](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_data/aggregation/struct.VolumeImbalanceBarAggregator.html "struct nautilus_data::aggregation::VolumeImbalanceBarAggregator")

Aggregates bars based on buy/sell volume imbalance.

[VolumeRunsBarAggregator](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_data/aggregation/struct.VolumeRunsBarAggregator.html "struct nautilus_data::aggregation::VolumeRunsBarAggregator")

Aggregates bars based on consecutive buy/sell volume runs.

Central orchestrator for managing actors, strategies, and execution algorithms.

# nautilus_binance::spot - Rust

[Skip to main content](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_binance/spot/index.html#main-content)

[Module spot](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_binance/spot/index.html#)

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[nautilus\_binance](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_binance/index.html)

Module spot Copy item path
==========================

[Source](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/src/nautilus_binance/spot/mod.rs.html#16-55)

Expand description

Binance Spot market adapter with full SBE (Simple Binary Encoding) support.

This module provides high-performance market data and execution clients for Binance Spot markets using SBE encoding for both REST API and WebSocket streams.

### [§](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_binance/spot/index.html#features)
Features

*   **SBE REST API**: All REST responses decoded from SBE format.
*   **SBE WebSocket Streams**: Market data streams with microsecond timestamps.
*   **Ed25519 Authentication**: Required for SBE market data streams.

### [§](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_binance/spot/index.html#architecture)
Architecture

    spot/
    ├── http/               # REST API client (SBE encoded)
    │   ├── client.rs       # BinanceSpotHttpClient
    │   ├── models.rs       # Response types
    │   └── query.rs        # Query parameter builders
    └── websocket/          # WebSocket clients (SBE encoded)
        ├── streams/        # Market data streams (pub/sub)
        │   ├── client.rs   # BinanceSpotWebSocketClient
        │   └── handler.rs  # Message parsing and routing
        └── trading/        # Trading API (request/response)
            ├── client.rs   # BinanceSpotWsTradingClient
            └── handler.rs  # Request/response handling

Re-exports[§](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_binance/spot/index.html#reexports)

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

`pub use data::[BinanceSpotDataClient](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_binance/spot/data/struct.BinanceSpotDataClient.html "struct nautilus_binance::spot::data::BinanceSpotDataClient") ;`

`pub use enums::[BinanceCancelReplaceMode](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_binance/spot/enums/enum.BinanceCancelReplaceMode.html "enum nautilus_binance::spot::enums::BinanceCancelReplaceMode") ;`

`pub use enums::[BinanceOrderResponseType](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_binance/spot/enums/enum.BinanceOrderResponseType.html "enum nautilus_binance::spot::enums::BinanceOrderResponseType") ;`

`pub use enums::[BinanceSpotOrderType](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_binance/spot/enums/enum.BinanceSpotOrderType.html "enum nautilus_binance::spot::enums::BinanceSpotOrderType") ;`

`pub use execution::[BinanceSpotExecutionClient](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_binance/spot/execution/struct.BinanceSpotExecutionClient.html "struct nautilus_binance::spot::execution::BinanceSpotExecutionClient") ;`

`pub use http::client::[BinanceSpotHttpClient](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_binance/spot/http/client/struct.BinanceSpotHttpClient.html "struct nautilus_binance::spot::http::client::BinanceSpotHttpClient") ;`

`pub use websocket::[BinanceSpotWebSocketClient](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_binance/spot/websocket/streams/client/struct.BinanceSpotWebSocketClient.html "struct nautilus_binance::spot::websocket::streams::client::BinanceSpotWebSocketClient") ;`

`pub use websocket::[BinanceSpotWsTradingClient](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_binance/spot/websocket/trading/client/struct.BinanceSpotWsTradingClient.html "struct nautilus_binance::spot::websocket::trading::client::BinanceSpotWsTradingClient") ;`

Modules[§](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_binance/spot/index.html#modules)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

HyperSync client integration for efficient blockchain data indexing.

, a high-performance blockchain data indexing service that enables efficient querying of historical blockchain data across multiple networks.

# nautilus_dydx::grpc - Rust

[Skip to main content](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_dydx/grpc/index.html#main-content)

[Module grpc](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_dydx/grpc/index.html#)

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[nautilus\_dydx](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_dydx/index.html)

Module grpc Copy item path
==========================

[Source](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/src/nautilus_dydx/grpc/mod.rs.html#16-50)

Expand description

gRPC client implementation for the dYdX v4 protocol.

This module provides gRPC client functionality for interacting with the dYdX v4 protocol via the Cosmos SDK. It handles:

*   Transaction signing and broadcasting using `cosmrs`.
*   gRPC communication with validator nodes.
*   Protocol Buffer message encoding/decoding.
*   Cosmos SDK account management.

The client supports dYdX trading operations including:

*   Order placement, modification, and cancellation.
*   Transfer operations between subaccounts.
*   Subaccount management.
*   Transaction signing with secp256k1 keys.

[§](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_dydx/grpc/index.html#architecture)
Architecture
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

dYdX v4 is built on the Cosmos SDK and uses gRPC for all state-changing operations (placing orders, transfers, etc.). The HTTP/REST API (Indexer) is read-only and used for querying market data and historical information.

Re-exports[§](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_dydx/grpc/index.html#reexports)

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

`pub use builder::[TxBuilder](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_dydx/grpc/builder/struct.TxBuilder.html "struct nautilus_dydx::grpc::builder::TxBuilder") ;`

`pub use client::[DydxGrpcClient](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_dydx/grpc/client/struct.DydxGrpcClient.html "struct nautilus_dydx::grpc::client::DydxGrpcClient") ;`

`pub use client::[Height](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_dydx/grpc/client/struct.Height.html "struct nautilus_dydx::grpc::client::Height") ;`

`pub use client::[TxHash](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_dydx/grpc/client/type.TxHash.html "type nautilus_dydx::grpc::client::TxHash") ;`

`pub use order::[DEFAULT_RUST_CLIENT_METADATA](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_dydx/grpc/order/constant.DEFAULT_RUST_CLIENT_METADATA.html "constant nautilus_dydx::grpc::order::DEFAULT_RUST_CLIENT_METADATA") ;`

`pub use order::[OrderBuilder](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_dydx/grpc/order/struct.OrderBuilder.html "struct nautilus_dydx::grpc::order::OrderBuilder") ;`

`pub use order::[OrderFlags](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_dydx/grpc/order/enum.OrderFlags.html "enum nautilus_dydx::grpc::order::OrderFlags") ;`

`pub use order::[OrderGoodUntil](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_dydx/grpc/order/enum.OrderGoodUntil.html "enum nautilus_dydx::grpc::order::OrderGoodUntil") ;`

`pub use order::[OrderMarketParams](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_dydx/grpc/order/struct.OrderMarketParams.html "struct nautilus_dydx::grpc::order::OrderMarketParams") ;`

`pub use order::[SHORT_TERM_ORDER_MAXIMUM_LIFETIME](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_dydx/grpc/order/constant.SHORT_TERM_ORDER_MAXIMUM_LIFETIME.html "constant nautilus_dydx::grpc::order::SHORT_TERM_ORDER_MAXIMUM_LIFETIME") ;`

`pub use types::[ChainId](https://nautilustrader.io/docs/rust-api-latest/nautilus_dydx/grpc/types/enum.ChainId.html "enum nautilus_dydx::grpc::types::ChainId") ;`
